layout_spacing.container: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-12

cards.default: rounded-2xl bg-[#052830]/50 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/5 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)] overflow-hidden relative
cards.premium: rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-br from-[#052830] to-[#021114] border border-[#D4AF37]/30 shadow-[0_0_24px_rgba(212,175,55,0.08)] relative overflow-hidden
cards.highlight: rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-br from-[#D4AF37] to-[#C5A028] text-[#021114] border-none shadow-lg shadow-[#D4AF37]/20

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-gradient-to-r from-[#00A896] to-[#028C7D] text-white px-8 py-3 transition-all duration-300 font-medium tracking-wide shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,168,150,0.25)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(0,168,150,0.4)]
buttons.secondary: rounded-full bg-transparent border border-[#D4AF37] text-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-[#D4AF37]/10 px-8 py-3 transition-all duration-300 font-medium tracking-wide

navigation.sidebar: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full w-64 bg-[#021114]/90 backdrop-blur-2xl border-r border-white/5 z-40 flex flex-col
navigation.header: sticky top-0 z-50 w-full bg-[#021114]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5 px-8 py-5 flex justify-between items-center

visual_enhancers.patterns: Use SVG noise or background-blend-mode with abstract teal/gold textures for depth.
visual_enhancers.gradients: Rich multi-stop gradients for backgrounds to avoid flatness.
visual_enhancers.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone weight) for high-end elegant feel. Import specific icons from @phosphor-icons/react.

images.description: Dynamic teal and gold abstract art with marble texture. Use as a fixed background absolute image with opacity-10 and mix-blend-overlay or screen to give the deep background a luxurious texture.
Female executive portrait for the user profile in header.
Stylish contemporary house exterior, used for featured property portfolio card.
Modern house with wooden facade, for portfolio grid.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install dependencies: `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react recharts clsx tailwind-merge framer-motion`.
Build a Dark/Jewel themed Dashboard. DO NOT make it a light theme. Background must be the rich, dark midnight teal gradient.
Implement the 'Bento Grid' layout. Include sections: Total Revenue, Occupancy Rate, Active Properties, and the 'Sahayak' AI Command Centre.
Apply 'Cormorant Garamond' strictly to headings to enforce the elegant, sophisticated female-executive tone. Body text should use 'Outfit'.
Incorporate the abstract texture background image via an absolute div with low opacity (`opacity-10`) behind the main dashboard content to break plainness.
Ensure cards have glassmorphism: `bg-[#052830]/50 backdrop-blur-xl`. Some key metric cards (e.g. Total Revenue) should use the 'highlight' gold background to create striking visual color blocks.
